description: Letter from Isma’il b. Farah, Alexandria, to Nahray b. Nissim, Fustat. September 23, 1056. The letter contains details about shipments of money and goods, and several requests to send letters, as well as requests related to buying goods (mainly sugar) and selling goods (mainly silk) in Fustat. Also mentions a large shipment of wax that was sent to the government. (Information from Gil, Kingdom, Vol. 3, #490) VMR
tags: 11th c, State, Nahray B. Nissim, silk, sugar, trade, wax
description_he: מכתב מהמאה ה-11. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
